message:
feat: add Cluster API (CAPI) federation provider (PR D) (#9395)

Implements the CAPI provider for the federation plugin architecture,
covering lifecycle-oriented cluster management (provisioning/provisioned/
failed/deleting states) via cluster.x-k8s.io/v1beta1 CRDs.

- Detect via clusters GVR with Limit:1
- ReadClusters maps CAPI Cluster.status.phase to unified ClusterState,
  batch-fetches MachineDeployments and KubeadmControlPlanes for lifecycle
  data (machine counts, control plane readiness)
- ReadGroups groups clusters by infrastructure reference kind
  (AWSCluster -> capi:awscluster, DockerCluster -> capi:dockercluster)
- ReadPendingJoins returns empty (provisioning clusters already surfaced)
- Unit tests for all phase mappings, lifecycle parsing, infra grouping,
  API server URL construction, and KCP fallback
- Demo data in useFederation.ts adds CAPI hub + 3 clusters + 1 group

Part of the multi-cluster federation plan (Issue #9368).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
